blockingIssues.description: `checkoutRef()` still trusts shell quoting to block leading-dash refs, but a temp-repo repro showed `git checkout '--detach'` is parsed as the real `--detach` option, so arbitrary option injection remains possible.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that isolated temp-repo git CLI validation is an acceptable semantic verification path for git command-construction fixes, and require workers to record deviations whenever they skip SSH verification or implement before tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `fix-git-ops-checkout-redact` review found source edits landed before tests, the handoff still reported `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` without deviations, and the only successful semantic check was the temp-repo git CLI repro already documented in `.factory/library/architecture.md`.
